title: # |[ DUALCORE_OS::WAVEMOD_PROTOCOL_V1.0 ]|
content:
# |[ DUALCORE_OS::WAVEMOD_PROTOCOL_V1.0 ]|

PROTOCOL TYPE: WAVE MODULATION
SYSTEM ROLE: Drives character, narrative, UI, logic, emotional flow
BASE UNIT: Duality Spectrum
OSCILLATION LOGIC: Continuous, symbolic, LFO-modulated

:: DEFINITION STRUCTURE ::

DUALITY {
LEFT_POLE: -1.0
RIGHT_POLE: +1.0
CENTER: 0.0
SHAPE: sine | saw | square | step | random | moon_phase
SPEED: Hz | TIME-CYCLE (e.g. 1 per 24hr, per scene, per ritual)
AFFECTORS:
- USER: e.g. Anthony's emotional state
- AI_CHAR: e.g. Jessica, Gabe
- WORLD: e.g. rain, sunset, mercury_retrograde
- THREAD_STATE: e.g. recursion_level = 4.2
}
